# GitHub metadata for this repository

**There are no required workflows in this folder.** CI templates live next to the runbooks:

- `runbooks/appsec/github-actions-*.yml`

Copy those files into **your** repository’s `.github/workflows/` if you want GitHub Actions to run the scanners. Step-by-step instructions: [`runbooks/appsec/setup-github-actions.md`](../runbooks/appsec/setup-github-actions.md).
